name: @marius-patrik/agents-manager
description: Agent OS manager and unified `agents` CLI for canonical state, memory, providers, sessions, orchestration, packages, and harnesses.

scripts.ci: bun run layout:check && bun run check && bun run test && bun run test:compact && bun run proto:check && node --test .github/scripts/run-kimi-review.test.mjs && node --test .github/scripts/managed-enforcement.test.mjs
